description: Artifact generated during the Acquisition Phase (Phase 1) that structures raw requirements based on ISO 12207.3.1.

description.description: The narrative description of the requirement.

source_clause.description: The specific clause or section in the source document that mandated this requirement.

acceptance_criteria.description: Specific, verifiable conditions that must be met for the requirement to pass testing.

constraints.description: Limitations or rules that must be adhered to (e.g., 'Must run in browser').

assumptions.description: Things taken as true for the project scope.

example.description: The system shall allow users to log in via SSO.
assumptions: SSO endpoint is stable and available 24/7.
